name: RDP Login from Localhost
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: RDP Login from Localhost
SIGMA Description: RDP login with localhost source address may be a tunnelled login

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=10 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%::1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%127.0.0.1%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY RDP Login from Localhost on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=10 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%::1%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%127.0.0.1%') AQL filter query
